name: build both images
prompt: Build the repo-owned Docker images for the srsRAN Project and srsUE stages.

name: project image only
prompt: Only build the Docker image used for the srsRAN Project release_25_10 stage.

name: ue image only
prompt: Prepare the Docker image used for the srsUE build lane.

name: dry run image plan
prompt: Show me the Docker build commands before building the Skillful RAN images.

name: negative pc readiness
prompt: Check whether Docker works and whether this PC has enough disk and memory.

name: negative project build
prompt: Clone and build srsRAN Project release_25_10 in .local/ocudu.

name: negative open5gs core
prompt: Bring up the Open5GS core compose stack and check its health.

name: negative skill qa
prompt: Run the QA skill against a new tracked skill before promotion.
